overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a post-apocalyptic survival game showing a character exploring an abandoned natural history museum. The character ascends a spiral ramp past overgrown vegetation to view large dinosaur skeleton exhibits in a sunlit atrium with glass ceilings.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground floor exhibit with spiral ramp and dinosaur skeleton

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the spiral ramp while observing the ground floor dinosaur skeleton exhibit

entered.detail: curved staircase structure with metal railings connecting ground floor to upper level
large dinosaur skeleton display on circular platform with grass overgrowth
weathered concrete museum wall with water damage stains
patch of grass and weeds growing through cracks in the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the ground floor of an abandoned museum, approaching a spiral ramp. A dinosaur skeleton stands to the right on an overgrown platform, while natural light filters through skylights above.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase connecting ground floor to upper exhibit hall

events.description: character begins ascending the spiral ramp toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the curved spiral ramp with metal railings

entered.detail: silver metal handrails lining both sides of the spiral staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the spiral staircase, gripping the metal railings while moving upward. The ground floor dinosaur skeleton falls behind as the character climbs toward the upper level exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level glass walkway overlooking main dinosaur exhibit hall

events.description: exiting the spiral staircase into the open upper exhibit hall with glass railings and skylights
character reaches into backpack and puts on a hat or headgear

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper walkway and observing the massive dinosaur skeletons suspended in the main hall

entered.detail: transparent glass safety barrier overlooking the main exhibit hall
massive brachiosaurus skeleton suspended from ceiling in the main atrium
large glass ceiling panels allowing natural sunlight to illuminate the hall
painted backdrop depicting prehistoric landscape with dinosaurs
museum wall covered in climbing vines and vegetation

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper walkway, the character explores a vast sunlit atrium with glass railings overlooking massive dinosaur skeletons. Natural light streams through the skylights, illuminating detailed murals and overgrown vegetation. The character briefly stops to put on headgear before continuing to observe the exhibits.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim ground floor of an abandoned museum up into a vast, sun-drenched atrium. It begins with the character walking past a dinosaur skeleton on an overgrown platform, moving steadily toward a spiral ramp as light filters through distant skylights. As the character ascends the staircase, gripping the metal railings, the ground floor exhibits recede and the perspective shifts upward toward the upper level exit. The scene then opens onto a wide walkway with glass railings, where the environment expands into a massive hall filled with streaming sunlight, detailed murals, and lush vegetation. Finally, the character briefly pauses to put on headgear before continuing to observe the towering dinosaur skeletons beneath the glass ceiling.
